summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 三位美國參議員基於倫理理由反對CLARITY法案，投票預計即將進行。
2. 以太坊基金會隱私團隊成立盈利性公司EthSystems，獲得Lubin和Bitmine的支持。
3. 美國CFTC阻止Kalshi取消交易，與密歇根州法院的命令相關。
4. Velocity籌集3800萬美元，為企業建立穩定幣財庫基礎設施。
5. 美國和英國財政部將對代幣化和穩定幣的跨大西洋規則進行對齊。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場呈現穩定的增長趨勢，總市值達到2.31兆美元。比特幣（BTC）價格上漲至$64,886，增幅約4.46%，持續吸引投資者的注意。以太坊（ETH）也表現良好，價格為$1,878.67，增幅達6.44%。其他主流幣如Solana（SOL）和幣安幣（BNB）亦有不同程度的上漲，市場整體氛圍偏向樂觀。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據技術指標，主要幣種如比特幣和以太坊的RSI分別為54.81和64.47，顯示出中性到強勁的買入信號。均線訊號則顯示多頭趨勢，特別是在以太坊方面，顯示出較強的上行潛力。大多數主流幣的技術面指標均表現出正向趨勢，反映出市場的活躍度和投資者的信心。

## 😱 市場情緒
目前的恐懼貪婪指數為22，顯示出市場處於極度恐懼狀態，這通常反映出投資者的高度謹慎和不安。然而，儘管有這樣的情緒，主流幣的價格仍在上漲，顯示出某種程度的抗壓能力。社群情緒方面，對於新法案和市場規範的討論熱度上升，可能影響未來的投資選擇。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
當前市場雖然顯示出上行潛力，但投資者需謹慎考慮潛在的政策風險，尤其是美國和英國在加密資產方面的監管動向。參議院對CLARITY法案的反對聲音及CFTC的行動可能會影響市場情緒及短期價格波動。此外，恐懼貪婪指數顯示極度恐懼，可能暗示著投資者情緒的脆弱。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
今日觀察的重點將包括美國參議院對CLARITY法案的投票結果及其對市場的影響。同時，關注以太坊基金會新成立的盈利性公司EthSystems的業務發展，及其可能對以太坊生態系統的影響。此外，市場對於穩定幣的發展及其規範的動向也應持續追蹤，以便及時調整投資策略。

news.title: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
news.summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune reportedly said the chamber will consider a vote on the crypto market structure bill before Aug. 10, though it’s unclear whether it has enough Democ
news.title_zh: 三位美國參議員基於倫理理由反對CLARITY法案，投票預計即將進行
news.summary_zh: 三位美國參議員對CLARITY法案表示反對，認為其存在倫理問題，投票將於近期進行。

news.title: Ethereum Foundation privacy team spins out as for-profit EthSystems to serve institutions with Lubin, Bitmine backing
news.summary: The startup will build tech and provide consulting to help institutions operate on Ethereum while maintaining confidentiality.
news.title_zh: 以太坊基金會隱私團隊成立盈利性公司EthSystems，為機構提供服務，獲Lubin和Bitmine支持
news.summary_zh: 以太坊基金會的隱私團隊成立了EthSystems，專注於為機構提供服務，並獲得了Lubin和Bitmine的支持。

news.title: U.S. CFTC moves to stop Kalshi from canceling trades as ordered by Michigan court
news.title_zh: 美國CFTC採取行動阻止Kalshi取消交易，根據密歇根州法院的命令
news.summary_zh: 美國商品期貨交易委員會（CFTC）介入，要求Kalshi遵守密歇根州法院的命令，停止取消交易。

news.title: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
news.summary: Backed by Dragonfly, FirstMark and Coinbase Ventures, the startup is expanding software that helps businesses integrate stablecoins into treasury and payment workflows.
news.title_zh: Velocity籌集3800萬美元，為企業建立穩定幣財庫基礎設施
news.summary_zh: Velocity成功籌集3800萬美元，計劃為企業打造穩定幣的財庫基礎設施。

news.title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
news.summary: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.
news.title_zh: DeepMind首席執行官表示AGI將比電力或火更具影響力
news.summary_zh: DeepMind的CEO預測，人工通用智能（AGI）將在未來的影響力上超越電力和火的發明。

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣市場發生了什麼
news.summary_zh: 今天的加密貨幣市場有多項重要事件，影響著投資者和市場動態。

news.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
news.summary: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.
news.title_zh: 美國和英國財政部將對代幣化和穩定幣的跨大西洋規則進行對齊
news.summary_zh: 美國和英國財政部計劃協調代幣化和穩定幣的相關規則，以促進市場的一致性。

news.title: CFTC orders Kalshi to honor Michigan trades, escalating clash with state regulators
news.summary: Jurisdiction over prediction market platforms is an ongoing dispute between the CFTC and multiple state regulators.
news.title_zh: CFTC命令Kalshi遵守密歇根州的交易，與州監管機構的衝突升級
news.summary_zh: CFTC要求Kalshi遵守密歇根州的交易決定，這使得與州監管機構的衝突進一步升級。

news.title: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
news.title_zh: 部分美國參議院民主黨人反對Clarity法案，稱其為“腐敗”法案
news.summary_zh: 一些美國參議院的民主黨人公開反對Clarity法案，認為該法案存在腐敗問題。

news.title: US-UK transatlantic taskforce unveils digital asset roadmap promoting stablecoin innovation
news.summary: The U.S. and UK are deepening cooperation on digital assets, particularly for stablecoins and tokenized assets.
news.title_zh: 美英跨大西洋工作小組公布數字資產路線圖，促進穩定幣創新
news.summary_zh: 美國和英國的跨大西洋工作小組發布了數字資產的路線圖，旨在促進穩定幣的創新發展。

news.title: Binance bets on becoming a crypto 'super app' as stablecoins reshape growth
news.title_zh: 幣安押注成為加密貨幣「超級應用程式」，穩定幣重塑增長
news.summary_zh: 幣安計劃轉型為一個多功能的加密平台，以應對穩定幣帶來的市場變化。

news.title: CoinFund’s David Pakman says crypto hasn’t solved tokenomics
news.summary: During an interview on The Starting Block David Pakman suggested projects could pay contributors in stablecoins.
news.title_zh: CoinFund的David Pakman表示，加密貨幣尚未解決代幣經濟學問題
news.summary_zh: David Pakman指出，目前的加密貨幣系統仍未能有效解決代幣經濟學的挑戰。

news.title: The Clarity Act isn't a ticket to sanctions evasion, actually
news.title_zh: 《清晰法案》實際上並不是逃避制裁的通行證
news.summary_zh: 專家強調，《清晰法案》並不允許任何形式的制裁逃避，需謹慎解讀。

news.title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach
news.summary: The change in tax policy, expected to effect about 700,000 people in the UK, is tied to the disposal of crypto in lending and liquidity pools.
news.title_zh: 英國政府對某些加密貨幣採取「無增無損」的資本利得延遲政策
news.summary_zh: 英國政府決定對特定加密貨幣的資本利得徵稅進行延遲，以減輕投資者壓力。

news.title: Wall Street turns cautious on Circle as analysts warn USDC economics face mounting pressure

news.title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
news.summary: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.
news.title_zh: JCB簽署Circle備忘錄，在日本測試穩定幣支付
news.summary_zh: JCB與Circle合作，計劃在日本進行穩定幣支付的實驗性測試。

news.title: Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat
news.title_zh: 瑞穗銀行將Circle評級下調至表現不佳，並將目標價下調至50美元
news.summary_zh: 瑞穗銀行因Open USD的威脅，將Circle的評級調整為不佳，並下調目標價。

news.title: Wikipedia blackout could hurt how AI engines like ChatGPT understand crypto
news.title_zh: 維基百科停擺可能影響AI引擎如ChatGPT對加密貨幣的理解
news.summary_zh: 維基百科的停擺可能會妨礙AI系統對加密貨幣信息的獲取和理解。

news.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets

news.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease

news.title: Bitcoin mining production slips in June for CleanSpark, BitFuFu and Canaan
news.summary: CleanSpark, BitFuFu and Canaan reported lower bitcoin production in June despite mining difficulty dropping more than 10%.

news.summary_zh: Galaxy推出的GOFR產品整合多個DeFi利率，為用戶提供更靈活的借貸選擇。

news.title: ‘Soft print, hard regime’: Bitcoin climbs toward $64,000 as June CPI falls 0.4% in largest monthly drop since 2020
news.summary: June CPI fell 0.4% and core held at 2.6% annually, lifting BTC toward $64,000 as analysts flip from fears to a summer recovery case.
news.title_zh: ‘軟數據，硬政策’：比特幣因六月CPI下降0.4%而攀升至64,000美元
news.summary_zh: 隨著CPI出現自2020年以來最大的月度降幅，比特幣價格上漲至64,000美元。

news.summary: Consumer prices cooled more than expected in June, yet geopolitical tensions continue to cast a shadow over crypto prices
news.title_zh: 比特幣因六年來最低的美國CPI而上漲至64,000美元

news.summary_zh: Benchmark看好Hut 8的增長潛力，並基於AI數據中心交易將目標價上調至165美元。

news.title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
news.summary: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.

news.summary_zh: 英國政府決定推遲對DeFi相關交易的資本利得稅，以促進該領域的發展。

news.title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
news.summary: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.
news.title_zh: Anchorage Digital擴大對Tron的支持，推出機構TRX質押
news.summary_zh: Anchorage Digital增強對Tron的支持，為機構客戶提供TRX質押服務。

news.title: JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics
news.title_zh: JPMorgan表示Hyperliquid的崛起威脅Circle的USDC經濟
news.summary_zh: JPMorgan警告Hyperliquid的增長可能對Circle的USDC穩定幣經濟造成影響。

news.title: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure
news.summary: BTC price action returned to $64,000 on low US CPI inflation but traders stayed wary of rejection at key resistance.
news.title_zh: 比特幣因2020年以來最低的美國CPI而上漲，交易者對64,000美元持謹慎態度
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格因通脹數據改善而上升，但交易者對突破64,000美元仍持謹慎態度。

news.summary: “Pact Labs gives us the rails to make digital dollars designed to be compliant with U.S. regulations," says Tether USAT.

news.summary_zh: Tether投資Pact Labs以促進USAT穩定幣的普及，顯示對穩定幣市場的信心。

news.summary: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

news.title: U.S. June CPI fell 0.4%, likely cooling move toward Fed rate hikes

news.title: CleanSpark signs $6.6 billion, 20-year data center lease with unnamed global tech firm
news.summary: CleanSpark has signed a 20-year, $6.6 billion data center lease in Sandersville, Georgia, with a confidential tech tenant.

news.summary_zh: CleanSpark與全球科技公司達成長期租約，顯示對數據中心需求的強勁信心。

news.title: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
news.summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin-buying machine stayed in neutral, while BTC and crypto majors chop and oil spikes ahead of a key CPI print this morning.
news.title_zh: 晨間快訊：Saylor的策略是儲存現金，不購買比特幣
news.summary_zh: Saylor選擇保留現金而非投資比特幣，顯示其對市場的謹慎態度。

news.title: ECB picks firms including Deutsche Bank, Revolut for digital euro pilot
news.title_zh: 歐洲央行選擇德意志銀行、Revolut等公司參與數位歐元試點
news.summary_zh: 歐洲央行挑選多家金融機構參與數位歐元的測試，推動數位貨幣的發展。

news.title_zh: 日本最大信用卡網絡與Circle合作，將穩定幣引入4000萬商家
news.summary_zh: 日本的信用卡網絡與Circle合作，計劃將穩定幣推廣至大量商家，促進數位支付。

news.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
news.summary: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.
news.title_zh: ABA和州銀行團體反對CLARITY法案中的穩定幣收益條款
news.summary_zh: 美國銀行協會及州銀行團體對CLARITY法案的穩定幣收益條款表示反對，擔心其影響。

news.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
news.summary: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.
news.title_zh: Solana社區領導者以鏈上透明度參加英國補選
news.summary_zh: Solana的社區領導者參加英國補選，強調鏈上透明度的重要性，吸引選民關注。

news.title: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
news.summary: The European Central Bank will beta test a digital euro with 36 providers, including Revolut, after the project drew more than 50 applications.
news.title_zh: 歐洲央行選擇36家支付提供商測試數位歐元，為2027年試點做準備
news.summary_zh: 歐洲央行選擇多家支付公司進行數位歐元測試，為未來的正式推出鋪路。

news.title: U.S.-Iran escalation weighs on bitcoin, stocks as oil climbs
news.title_zh: 美伊緊張局勢影響比特幣和股票，油價上漲
news.summary_zh: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係導致比特幣和股票市場波動，同時油價上漲。

news.title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
news.summary: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.
news.title_zh: 美國政府將2.88億美元的扣押加密貨幣轉移至Coinbase Prime
news.summary_zh: 美國政府將大量扣押的加密貨幣轉移至Coinbase Prime，顯示對加密市場的監管行動。

news.title: Bitcoin's BIP-110 sparked a fight over who gets to decide the future of Bitcoin
news.title_zh: 比特幣的BIP-110引發了誰決定比特幣未來的爭論
news.summary_zh: BIP-110提案引發社群內部對比特幣未來方向的激烈討論，涉及治理權限的爭奪。

news.title: Prediction markets just crushed traditional sportsbooks in a massive $50 billion World Cup breakout

news.summary_zh: 預測市場在世界杯期間表現優異，成功超越傳統體育博彩，顯示出其潛力。

news.title: UK HMRC adopts ‘no gain, no loss’ tax treatment for crypto lending, liquidity pools
news.summary: HMRC adopts "no gain, no loss" treatment for certain crypto loans and liquidity pool transactions, deferring CGT until economic disposal.
news.title_zh: 英國HMRC對加密貸款和流動性池採取‘無利潤，無損失’的稅收處理
news.summary_zh: 英國稅務機構對加密貨幣貸款和流動性池的稅收政策進行了新的調整，減輕納稅人負擔。

news.title: Bitcoin’s great rotation: Long-term holders pass supply to a new generation of buyers
news.title_zh: 比特幣的重大輪換：長期持有者將供應轉讓給新一代買家
news.summary_zh: 長期持有者開始將比特幣供應轉讓給新買家，顯示市場動態的變化。

news.title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
news.summary: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.
news.title_zh: AI並未引發DeFi‘黑客末日’，Dragonfly合夥人表示
news.summary_zh: 專家指出，儘管AI技術發展迅速，但並未導致DeFi領域的安全危機。

news.title: Bitcoin steadies at $62,600 as South Koreans flee stocks rout for crypto
news.title_zh: 比特幣穩定在62,600美元，南韓投資者逃離股市轉向加密貨幣
news.summary_zh: 隨著股市下跌，南韓投資者轉向比特幣，導致其價格穩定在62,600美元。

news.title: XRP and ether bulls are getting louder as prices fall, signaling more trouble ahead
news.title_zh: XRP和以太坊多頭在價格下跌時聲音越來越大，預示著更多麻煩

news.title: US government moves over $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime: Arkham
news.summary: According to Arkham, U.S. government wallets maintain a large crypto portfolio estimated at over $20 billion, including 324,552 BTC.

news.title: Hobby-level miner bags $200K solo BTC block with budget Bitaxe rig
news.summary: A solo Bitcoin miner secured a $200,000 block reward with a budget mining rig, pushing payouts to hobby-level miners to $4.7 million for the past year.
news.title_zh: 業餘礦工以預算Bitaxe設備挖到20萬美元的單個比特幣區塊
news.summary_zh: 一名業餘礦工使用低成本設備成功挖掘到一個價值20萬美元的比特幣區塊。

news.title: Former LASD deputy jailed for obstructing crypto ‘mogul’ Adam Iza extortion probe
news.summary: A former LASD deputy was sentenced to 18 months in federal prison for lying about an Adam Iza extortion incident.

news.summary_zh: 前副警長因妨礙對加密貨幣大亨的勒索調查而被判刑，案件引發廣泛關注。

news.title: Bitcoin bear market will bottom when two-month RSI metric hits zero, trader predicts
news.summary: Bitcoin RSI continued to copy previous bear markets as a trader predicted that historical BTC price bottom signals would "happen again" in 2026.
news.title_zh: 比特幣熊市將在兩個月RSI指標達到零時觸底，交易者預測
news.summary_zh: 一位交易者預測，比特幣熊市將在RSI指標降至零時觸底，暗示市場可能出現反彈。

news.title: South Korea maintains blockchain economy push as AI takes center stage
news.summary: Plans include the enactment of the Digital Asset Basic Act and advancement of a CBDC project linked to the tokenization of government bonds.

news.summary_zh: 南韓政府在人工智慧日益重要的背景下，仍然致力於發展區塊鏈技術和經濟。

news.title: South Korea to test tokenized government bonds with CBDC in 2027
news.summary: South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.
news.title_zh: 南韓計劃在2027年測試以CBDC為基礎的代幣化政府債券
news.summary_zh: 南韓政府計劃於2027年進行代幣化政府債券的測試，並將其與中央銀行數字貨幣結合。

news.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $425M outflow after brief rebound
news.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw their largest single-day outflows in July, with $424.66 million leaving the funds, reversing a brief return to positive weekly flows.

news.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises past $64,000 after soft inflation data, Warsh testimony

news.summary_zh: 比特幣因軟性通脹數據和Warsh的證詞而上漲，價格突破64,000美元。

news.title: U.S. government moves $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime
news.title_zh: 美國政府將2.88億美元的被查獲比特幣和以太幣轉移至Coinbase Prime

news.summary_zh: 一位獨立比特幣礦工以僅150美元的設備成功賺取20萬美元，顯示出個人挖礦的潛力。

news.title: White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt to take military leave: Report
news.summary: Witt’s departure comes during a critical moment for the CLARITY Act, with deputy director Harry Jung expected to assume his responsibilities.
news.title_zh: 白宮加密顧問Patrick Witt將請假參軍：報導
news.summary_zh: 白宮的加密顧問Patrick Witt將暫時請假，前往參軍，這對加密政策可能產生影響。

news.title: US government moves $297M in seized Bitcoin, Ether to Coinbase Prime
news.summary: The transfers have raised questions over Trump’s Bitcoin reserve pledge, though deposits to Coinbase Prime do not confirm an impending sale.

news.title: Bitcoin slips as traders lift July Fed rate hike bets ahead of Inflation report

news.summary_zh: 隨著交易者對7月美聯儲加息的押注增加，比特幣價格出現下滑，市場情緒變化。

news.title: Thai scammer's $122M wallet, Japan embraces crypto credit: Asia Express
news.summary: Bitcoin backed mortgages and stablecoin yield are hot topics in Japan right now, as Hyundai experiments with Avalanche for global stablecoin transfers. Asia Express

news.title: CLARITY Act gains second law enforcement endorsement before Senate push
news.summary: The Federal Law Enforcement Officers Association expressed support for the CLARITY Act but urged changes to the legislation’s language.
news.title_zh: CLARITY法案在參議院推動前獲得第二次執法機構的支持
news.summary_zh: CLARITY法案在參議院推動之前，獲得了第二家執法機構的支持，顯示出其推進的潛力。

news.title: Bitcoin Covenants Part 4: OP_CHECKSIGFROMSTACK and OP_CAT
news.summary: OP_CSFS authenticates signatures over arbitrary data. OP_CAT concatenates stack values into a single message. Together, they let Bitcoin scripts verify transaction structure at spend time, without pre-signed key management or new consensus rules b
news.title_zh: 比特幣契約第四部分：OP_CHECKSIGFROMSTACK和OP_CAT
news.summary_zh: 本文探討比特幣契約中的兩個重要操作碼，OP_CHECKSIGFROMSTACK和OP_CAT，及其在智能合約中的應用。

news.title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
news.summary: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.
news.title_zh: 停止過度提示：OpenAI的新GPT-5.6指導方針改變一切
news.summary_zh: OpenAI發布的新GPT-5.6指導方針旨在減少過度提示，徹底改變用戶與AI的互動方式。
